nasb.text: You shall teach them to your sons, talking of them when you sit in your house and when you walk along the road and when you lie down and when you rise up.

esv.text: You shall teach them to your children, talking of them when you are sitting in your house, and when you are walking by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.

cnv.text: 你們也要把這些話教訓你們的兒女，無論你是坐在家裡，行在路上，躺下，或是起來，都要講論。

ccb.text: 要用这些话教导你们的儿女，无论在家在外、或起或卧，都要讲论；
